## 6) Dependencies, risks, and mitigations

### Dependencies

| Dependency | Needed by | Status | Risk if missing |
|---|---|---|---|
| MVP1 shipped (`ElasticAdapter`, `SearchAdapter` Protocol, study lifecycle) | All stories | shipped | N/A |
| `feat_ubi_judgments` shipped (`UbiReader`, hybrid converter, `/judgments/generate-from-ubi`) | A1 (probe UBI detection), A10 (UBI reader integration test) | shipped (PR #317) | Would block "every UBI path extends to Solr" outcome |
| `feat_demo_ubi_study_comparison` shipped (`samples/ubi_index_mappings.json`) | A10 (UBI seed fixture) | shipped (PR #320) | Would require this feature to define UBI mapping — minor |
| Apache Solr `solr:10.0` Docker image | A10 | external, public | Pin minor version to lock the version-mismatch surface |
| `feat_index_document_browser` shipped (`get_document` / `list_documents` Protocol methods, router) | A8 | shipped | Would mean implementing the router too — would push this feature's scope up |
| `feat_contextual_help_mvp2` shipped (glossary infrastructure) | A11 | shipped (PR #124) | Glossary keys would have no home — minor |
| Demo seeding system engine-aware (SCENARIOS dicts carry `engine_type`; `news` runs on OpenSearch) | A13 | shipped (`feat_demo_ubi_study_comparison` etc.) | Confirmed by 2026-05-30 audit — adding a Solr scenario follows the OpenSearch precedent; no framework work needed |
| Guide 01 `01_register_first_cluster` exists + covers ES/OpenSearch | A12 (extend to Solr) | shipped | Audit confirmed; extending it (vs new Guide 11) keeps one unified registration walkthrough |
| `<DemoBadge>` + `demo-data.ts` slug allowlists + `verify_demo_slug_parity.sh` | A13 | shipped (PR #320) | Solr demo slug adds to both sides in lockstep; CI guard enforces parity |

### Risks

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Solr 10.x `bin/solr auth enable-basic-auth` CLI changes between minor versions | L | M | Pin `solr:10.0` exactly; runbook documents how to refresh the bootstrap script when bumping |
| SolrCloud cassette drift (cassettes captured against a maintainer's manual cluster) | M | L | Runbook documents the re-record procedure; CI flags cassette-age in the SolrCloud test (warn if cassette > 90 days old) |
| cursorMark semantics change between Solr 9 and 10 | L | M | Integration tests run against the pinned image; bumping Solr triggers a re-run of the 101-doc no-gap test |
| New target created post-registration → adapter-side cache becomes stale per cluster restart | L | L | Operators run `POST /reprobe` to persist; documented in the runbook |
| LTR model upload via `/schema/model-store` requires admin auth | M | L | The integration-test fixture uses the bootstrapped admin credentials; runbook documents the same |

### Failure mode catalog

| Failure mode | Trigger | Expected system behavior | Recovery |
|---|---|---|---|
| Compose Solr unreachable at registration | `base_url` typo, port collision, container crashed | `register_cluster` rolls back row insert atomically; returns 503 `CLUSTER_UNREACHABLE` | Operator fixes config; retries |
| Solr `bin/solr auth enable-basic-auth` fails at container startup | Secret-file missing or unreadable; binary not in PATH | Container exits non-zero; healthcheck never goes green; `/healthz` reports `subsystems.solr.status="unreachable"` | Operator inspects `docker logs solr`; runbook documents common causes |
| `/reprobe` concurrent calls | Two operators click "reprobe" simultaneously | `SELECT … FOR UPDATE` blocks; second call sees the first's updated `engine_config` | Automatic |
| Study create references missing LTR model | Operator added the param without uploading the model | 400 `LTR_MODEL_NOT_FOUND` with the list of available models in the message | Operator uploads model → re-runs `/reprobe` → retries study create |
| cursorMark depagination skips on terminal page | (Would happen if A8 used `rows=limit+1` — spec FR-9 cycle-2 fix prevents this) | N/A — explicit test in A8 prevents regression | N/A |

---

## 7) Sequencing and parallelization

### Suggested sequence

1. **A6** (registry relocation + migration) — foundation; everything else imports from `registry.py`.
2. **A1** (adapter skeleton + probe) — establishes the class for A2–A8 to extend.
3. **A2** (`render`) — needed by A3 (`search_batch` consumes rendered output) and A7 (LTR rescore renders into the same dict).
4. **A3, A4, A5, A8** — can run in PARALLEL after A1 + A2 land (independent adapter methods). A8 also needs A1 for `unique_key_per_target`.
5. **A7** — depends on A1 (probe lists models) + A2 (`render`).
6. **A9** — `/reprobe` + `/test-connection`. Depends on A1 (`probe_capabilities()` + `health_check()`) + A6 (`build_adapter` + cross-product validation). `/test-connection` must land before A11's connection-test button can be wired.
7. **A10** — Compose + configsets + sample data + `/healthz`. Mostly independent; integration tests for A3–A8 + the A13 demo require A10's live Solr container.
8. **A11** — frontend. Depends on A6 (wire Literals) + A9 (`/test-connection` endpoint for the button).
9. **A12** — Guide 01 extension + runbook + tutorial + E2E spec + arch-doc patches. Depends on A11 (the guide screenshots + E2E capture the shipped UI).
10. **A13** — Solr demo scenario. Depends on A6 (engine allowlist) + A10 (Compose Solr + configsets) + the full adapter (A1–A8, so the demo study runs) + A11 (frontend `demo-data.ts` slug). Effectively last alongside A12.

### Parallelization opportunities

- **Backend track 1:** A6 → A1 → A2 → (A3 || A4 || A5 || A8) → A7 → A9
- **Backend track 2 (parallel from start):** A10 (Compose + configsets + scripts)
- **Frontend track (parallel from A6, joins A9 for the button):** A11
- **Docs + demo track (after the UI + Compose land):** A12 (Guide 01 + runbook + E2E), A13 (demo scenario)

A single agent will execute sequentially; the dependency graph above is for human review of the critical path. **A12 + A13 are genuinely last** — both exercise the fully-assembled feature (the guide screenshots, the E2E loop, and the demo study all need the complete adapter + UI + Compose stack live).

---

## 8) Rollout and cutover plan

- **Rollout stages:** single PR → merge to `main` → operator-driven local upgrade via `make up` (brings up the new `solr` Compose service).
- **Feature flag strategy:** none. The migration extends CHECK constraints (pure relaxation); existing rows unaffected.
- **Migration/cutover steps:** `make migrate` runs the new `0022` revision on next `make up`. No data backfill required.
- **Reconciliation:** N/A.
- **Operator action required:** none for the upgrade itself. Operators who want to use Solr register a cluster via the existing UI (now with `engine_type=Apache Solr` option).

---

## 9) Execution tracker

### Current sprint

- [x] A6 — registry.py + migration 0022 + auth extension — **DONE** (commit `157e0b9f`). registry.py created; elastic.py re-export shim; wire Literals + ORM CHECK + credentials extended; migration 0022 round-trip + Solr-row downgrade-abort verified vs real Postgres. 1789 unit + 12 contract green; lint + mypy clean.
- [x] A1 — SolrAdapter skeleton + capability probe + Protocol conformance — **DONE**. `backend/app/adapters/solr.py` lands with full `probe_capabilities()` (version + mode + targets + uniqueKey-per-target + LTR module/models + UBI), `health_check()`, `list_query_parsers()`; stubs for A2–A8 raise `NotImplementedError`. `protocol.py` extends `DocumentPage` with `next_cursor_token`. `services/cluster.py` `build_adapter()` dispatches on `engine_type`; shared `_build_adapter_from_args` factory. 53 new unit tests cover Protocol shape, probe parsing (Solr 10 cloud + Solr 9 standalone fallback + multi-collection uniqueKey + UBI variants), version-floor + auth + health_check + list_query_parsers. 184 adapter+service unit tests pass; lint + typecheck clean.
- [x] A2 — render edismax/dismax/lucene + templates — **DONE**. `SolrAdapter.render()` produces a Solr request-parameter dict that mixes Solr-native keys (`defType`, `q`, `qf`, `pf`, `tie`, `mm`, `ps`, `bf`, `boost`, `rq`, `fl`, ...) with unified keys that auto-pivot via module-level `_PARAM_PIVOTS` (field_boosts→qf, phrase_field_boosts→pf, tie_breaker→tie, min_should_match→mm, slop→ps, boost_fn→bf|boost by combine, rerank_model→rq={!ltr ...}). Unknown keys → `InvalidQueryDSLError` with friendly `fuzziness`→`'~' operator` message. 3 sample templates land at `samples/templates/solr/products_{edismax,dismax,lucene}.j2`; `samples/templates/README.md` documents the `<engine>/` subdir convention. 45 new unit tests: TestSampleTemplates (3 canonical j2s render correctly), per-pivot helper coverage (TestQfPivot/PfPivot/TiePivot/PsPivot — all rejection paths), TestRenderRejectsUnknownKeys, TestNativeParamPassThrough, TestMmStringInput (8 parametrized arithmetic forms including `2<-25% 9<-3`), TestCombineAdd/Multiply for boost_fn. 218 adapter unit tests pass.
- [x] A3 — search_batch parallel /select — **DONE**. `SolrAdapter.search_batch()` issues one `/select` per query via `asyncio.gather(..., return_exceptions=True)`; preserves `query_id` mapping; resolves uniqueKey via `_resolve_unique_key` (engine_config cache → on-demand `/schema/uniquekey` → "id" fallback). `_normalize_fl` ensures `score` AND uniqueKey survive into every request param (without `score` Solr omits the field from response.docs). `strict_errors=True`: per-query 400 → `InvalidQueryDSLError`, 5xx/401/403 → `ClusterUnreachableError`, timeout → `QueryTimeoutError`, 404 → `TargetNotFoundError` (raised regardless of mode — hard error). `strict_errors=False`: same failures empty-list the failing query_id; siblings still succeed. `X-Request-Id` propagation. 22 new unit tests: TestHappyPath (mapping + empty + request-id), TestUniqueKeyResolution (sku + fallback-cache), TestFlNormalization (7 parametrized cases + integration), TestStrictErrors (400/500/404), TestLenientErrors (one-bad-doesnt-abort + 5xx-empty), TestTopKPropagation (rows-set + body-wins), TestResponseParsing (skip-missing-score + empty).
- [x] A4 — get_schema + list_targets — **DONE**. `list_targets()` dispatches on `engine_config["mode"]` (auto-detects via `_detect_mode` when absent); cloud path → `/admin/collections?action=LIST` + parallel `/select?q=*:*&rows=0` doc-count probes; standalone path → `/admin/cores?action=STATUS` reading `index.numDocs`. System-target exclusion runs FIRST then `fnmatch.fnmatchcase` glob filter — operators cannot re-expose system targets. 401/403 → `TargetsForbiddenError`, 5xx → `ClusterUnreachableError`. `get_schema()` calls `/<target>/schema/fields`; parses field list into unified `Schema(FieldSpec[])`; 404 → `TargetNotFoundError`. 11 new unit tests cover cloud + standalone paths, glob filtering, 401/403 distinction, 404, and malformed-field skipping.
- [x] A5 — explain — **DONE**. `SolrAdapter.explain()` issues `/<target>/select?debugQuery=true&debug=results&fq=<uniqueKey>:<lucene-escaped doc_id>&rows=1` and converts `debug.explain[<doc_id>]` into the unified `ExplainTree` (recursive via `_solr_explain_to_unified` helper). Doc IDs with Lucene metacharacters (`:`, `+`, `-`, `(`, `)`, spaces, backslashes, etc.) escaped via the module-level `_lucene_escape` helper before URL encoding. Existing `fq` in the query body is preserved (appended to as a list). 404 → `TargetNotFoundError`; 401/403 → `ClusterUnreachableError`; unmatched doc → `ExplainTree(matched=False, value=0.0, description="no match")`. 19 new unit tests: TestLuceneEscape (9 parametrized cases including back\\slash), TestExplainHappyPath (matched + sku-uniqueKey-pin), TestExplainFailures (404 + 401 + unmatched), TestExplainEscaping (5 parametrized metachar IDs).
- [x] A8 — get_document + list_documents (RealTime Get + cursorMark + uniqueKey) — **DONE**. `get_document()` calls `/<target>/get?id=<doc_id>` (Solr RealTime Get); returns `None` when Solr reports `doc: null`; 404 → `TargetNotFoundError`. `list_documents()` paginates via `q=*:*&sort=<uniqueKey> asc&rows=<limit>&cursorMark=<token>` — first page sets `cursorMark=*`, subsequent pages set the previous `nextCursorMark`. **Terminal-page rule (spec FR-9 cycle-3)**: when `nextCursorMark == current cursorMark`, set `next_cursor_token=None` so the router's `has_more` derivation flips to False without an extra overfetch — drives AC-13's 101-docs/limit-25-no-gap pagination. Caller-supplied `fields` always include uniqueKey (auto-inserted) so the parser can extract `doc_id`. 12 new unit tests: TestGetDocument (happy + missing + 404 + 401 + sku + new-target-cache-seed-and-reuse), TestListDocumentsCursorMark (first-page-uses-star + subsequent-uses-search_after + terminal-condition-sets-None + AC-13 101-doc no-gap test), TestListDocumentsFailures (404 + uniqueKey-in-fl-injection). 280 adapter unit tests pass.
- [x] A7 — LTR rescore + LTR_MODEL_NOT_FOUND — **DONE**. New `LtrModelNotFoundError` domain exception (`backend/app/adapters/errors.py`) carrying `model_id` + `available` attrs. `SolrAdapter.render()` runs a pre-flight `_check_ltr_model_available` BEFORE pivoting: when `engine_config.ltr_models` is populated (capability probe ran) AND the template emits a `rerank_model` whose `id` isn't in the list, raises `LtrModelNotFoundError`. Empty / missing `ltr_models` skips validation (so a failed probe doesn't false-positive-reject). Router translation: `backend/app/api/v1/clusters.py` `run_query` handler now maps `LtrModelNotFoundError` → 400 `LTR_MODEL_NOT_FOUND` per spec §8.5. 7 new unit tests + 1935 backend unit tests pass. **Deferred to A11 follow-on**: pre-flight study-create validator (needs cluster.engine_config lookup at study create time; render-time check covers the trial-run path).
- [x] A9 — /reprobe + /test-connection + service-layer probe persistence — **DONE (backend; live integration tests deferred to A10's Compose stack)**. Two new endpoints: `POST /api/v1/clusters/{id}/reprobe` (202 → ClusterDetail with refreshed engine_config; concurrent calls serialize on `SELECT … FOR UPDATE`) and `POST /api/v1/clusters/test-connection` (200 → ConnectionTestResult with `reachable`, `status`, `version`, `engine_capabilities`, `error` — always 200, transport failures surface as `reachable=false`). New service functions: `reprobe_cluster()` runs `health_check + probe_capabilities` (Solr) and persists ProbeResult into engine_config inside the same transaction as the SELECT FOR UPDATE; `test_cluster_connection()` builds a transient adapter from unsaved form fields, validates engine×auth cross-product, runs the probe, and returns the result WITHOUT any DB write. New `ConnectionTestRequest` / `ConnectionTestResult` Pydantic schemas in `schemas.py`. New repo helpers `get_cluster_by_id_for_update` (SELECT FOR UPDATE) + `update_cluster_engine_config`. ## 11b) Cross-model + Gemini review (post-PR, PR #336)

### Self-review fixes (caught before/at PR open) — all fixed + regression-tested

| # | Sev | Location | Verdict | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| S1 | High | `docker/solr/bootstrap-security.sh` | **Fixed** | The credential hash was a single `sha256` over the *base64-text* salt; Solr's `Sha256AuthenticationProvider` stores `base64(sha256(sha256(raw_salt_bytes ‖ password)))` + `base64(raw_salt_bytes)`. The admin user would never authenticate. Fixed to the correct double-sha256 over raw salt bytes via `openssl`; script hard-fails if `openssl` is absent. **Confirm via the BLOCKING `make up` + credentialed `/select` round-trip before merge.** |
| S2 | High | `backend/app/services/cluster.py` `dispatch_run_query` | **Fixed** | run_query wrapped the body in the ES `{query, size}` shape for every engine — Solr would get meaningless `query`/`size` params. Now branches per engine_type (Solr passes `query_dsl` through as params). 3 regression tests. |
| S3 | High | `backend/app/adapters/solr.py` `_build_select_request` | **Fixed** | `_validate_solr_param_values` rejects non-scalar `/select` params (`InvalidQueryDSLError` → 400) so a nested ES-DSL body sent to a Solr cluster surfaces cleanly instead of crashing httpx. 2 regression tests. |
| S4 | Medium | `backend/app/adapters/solr.py` `list_documents` | **Fixed** | Secondary terminal guard nulls `next_cursor_token` when `len(hits) < limit`. 2 regression tests. |

### GPT-5.5 final review (against the corrected 90-file PR diff) — 2 findings

NOTE: the first GPT-5.5 run was fed a corrupted oversized diff (a proxied `git diff` pulled in already-merged feature content); those phantom findings were discarded. Re-run against the authoritative `gh api compare main...HEAD` diff:

| # | Sev | Location | Verdict | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| G5-1 | Medium | `docker/solr/bootstrap-security.sh` | **Already-correct + verify-live** | Flagged that anonymous `/admin/info/system` under `blockUnknown=true` depends on permission ordering. The committed `security.json` already lists the `role:null` `open-info-system` permission BEFORE the `all` catch-all — correct for `RuleBasedAuthorizationPlugin` (first match wins). No code change; the BLOCKING `make up` round-trip confirms it live. |
| G5-2 | Low | `backend/app/adapters/solr.py` `_normalize_fl` | **Rejected** | `_normalize_fl` already `.strip()`s tokens + membership-checks before appending, so `fl=score,score` can't occur. Case-folding dedup would be wrong — Solr field names are case-sensitive. |

### Gemini Code Assist — 6 findings (all pinned to first SHA `ab510b8b`)

| # | Sev | Location | Verdict | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Gm1 | Critical | `solr.py` `_request`/`search_batch` | **Rejected** | "retry re-sends empty body" — `search_batch` issues `GET /select` with `params=`, no body; the retry re-invokes `client.request(**kwargs)` with the same kwargs. Hunk-isolated false positive. |
| Gm2 | High | `solr.py` `probe_capabilities` | **Deferred** | Sequential per-target uniqueKey calls — perf only, registration-time, demo clusters have 1–3 collections. Followups item 8. |
| Gm3 | Medium | `solr.py` `search_batch` | **Deferred** | No explicit `asyncio.gather` semaphore — httpx's default pool already caps concurrent sockets. Followups item 9. |
| Gm4 | Medium | `solr.py` `explain` | **Rejected (already handled)** | `body.get("debug") or {}` → absent debug yields the no-match tree. |
| Gm5 | Medium | `solr.py` `_build_select_request` | **Deferred** | Validate non-int `rows` — Solr already 400s + we translate; degrades safely. Followups item 10. |
| Gm6 | Medium | `solr.py` `list_documents` | **Accepted (already fixed)** | cursorMark loop risk — closed by S4's short-page guard at HEAD (pinned to the pre-S4 SHA). |

Outcome: 4 self-review fixes + regression tests; 2 real GPT-5.5 findings (1 already-correct/verify-live, 1 rejected); 6 Gemini findings (3 rejected/already-handled, 3 deferred as perf hardening to `chore_solr_post_pipeline_followups`). 0 blocking code issues. 1943 backend + 967 UI tests pass. **Merge remains BLOCKED on the operator `make up` + credentialed `/select` round-trip** (validates S1 + G5-1).
